title: viola samothracica
intro: Viola samothracica, also known as the Samothrace pansy or the Greek pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Viola samothracica include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Viola samothracica typically include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
